hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; } || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in 'git commit'*) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && uv run ruff check cli/src/ services/ libs/ 2>/dev/null;; esac; } || true
echo '{"systemMessage": "Session complete. Remember to run make test-all before pushing."}'
